title: Preview: Bolton Wanderers vs Stockport County - prediction, team news, lineups
text: Bolton Wanderers (3rd place) face Stockport County (5th place) in a League One promotion battle. Bolton recently secured a 2-1 victory over Plymouth Argyle despite playing with ten men after a red card. Stockport enter on strong form, having won their last four matches with an impressive 3-0 victory over Wycombe Wanderers. The visitors notably hold a superior head-to-head record, having defeated Bolton in their last three meetings. Team News & Injuries — Bolton Wanderers: Unavailable: John McAtee (red card suspension), Ethan Erhahon (injury), Xavier Simons (injury). Mason Burstow expected to replace McAtee in wide position. Stockport County: No significant changes anticipated following Wycombe win. Isaac Olaofe set to lead the attack. Predicted Lineups — Bolton: Bonham; Osei-Tutu, Toal, Johnston, Conway; Sheehan, Rodrigues; Burstow, Kenny, Gale; Dalby. Stockport: Addai; Dacres-Cogley, Olowu, Pye, Osborn; Norwood, Bailey; Diamond, Wootton, Stokes; Olaofe. Sports Mole predicts: Bolton Wanderers 1-2 Stockport County, favoring the visitors based on superior recent form and head-to-head advantage.
